documentation.description:
This package provides a data type for diagnostics produced by Langkit
generated libraries.

array_types.code: type Diagnostics_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Diagnostic;

record_types.name: Diagnostic

fields.name: Sloc_Range
fields.description: The source location range that the diagnostic message refers to

subprograms.name: Append

documentation.description: Shortcut to append an exception message to a vector

subprograms.name: Append

documentation.description: Shortcut to append a diagnostic to a vector

subprograms.name: Create
Print

documentation.description:
Print all diagnostics in ``Diagnostics`` on the standard output, with
``Prefix`` before each message. For multi-line messages, insert
``Indent`` spaces before each line except the first one.

Pretty prints the given diagnostic.

.. note:: This is only intended for quick pretty printing in debugging
   for example. If you want more powerful and pretty output of
   diagnostics, use :ada:ref`Langkit_Support.Diagnostics.Output`.

generic_instantiations.name: Diagnostics_Vectors
